function.name: time_series_animation
function.description: Create temporal animations showing ice evolution over time. Provides playback controls and frame-by-frame visualization of changes.

layer_name.description: The name of the layer to animate (e.g., 'SWOT freeboard', 'ICESat-2 thickness')

time_start.description: Start time for animation in ISO format (e.g., '2024-01-01'). Defaults to '2024-01-01'.

time_end.description: End time for animation in ISO format (e.g., '2024-12-31'). Defaults to '2024-12-31'.

frame_rate.description: Milliseconds per frame (default 1000ms). Lower values = faster animation.

auto_play.description: Whether to automatically start playing the animation (default false)

ui.title: Creating Time Series Animation
ui.details: Setting up temporal animation with playback controls
